case_title: CLODUALDO GOMEZ VS. SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY DBA RECOLOGY SUNSET ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT.
